description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical traffic delineator post, primarily orange in color, with a wide, octagonal black base for stability. The post features a single, wide, white reflective stripe positioned near the top, enhancing its visibility in low-light conditions. The body of the post is smooth and tapers slightly as it meets the base, which appears to be made of heavy rubber or a similar material to prevent tipping. The top of the post is capped with a solid, rounded orange tip, free of attachments or openings. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for use in urban environments to guide or restrict vehicle and pedestrian movement. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible, and the object appears to be in new or well-maintained condition.
description: A tall orange traffic delineator post with a wide black octagonal base and a single white reflective stripe near the top. The post is smooth, sturdy, and designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange post, white reflective stripe, and the full octagonal black base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the reflective stripe and the base's shape, with minimal change in visible features.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, showing the same features with the reflective stripe and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the orange post, reflective stripe, and black base all visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, white reflective stripe located near the top of the post, encircling its circumference.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, rounded, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, black, and appears thick and heavy, likely made of rubber for stability and weight.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
